ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SKLEARN'S LOAD DIGITS FUNCTION. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED USING 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARISON WITH A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE PERFORMANCE OF BOTH MODELS IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.97.
